Connect your setup to your speed.

KartSync links what's on your carb to what's on your stopwatch — jetting, engine hours, telemetry, satellite mapping, video and your whole team, in one place.

Setup in. Performance out. Finally connected.

The only platform that does it all: log your setup, your jetting, your gearing, and link your telemetry. KartSync does the rest, so you can see what you changed and what it did.

Logging a session — on your phone, trackside
Maintain

Know your engine's hours before it tells you the hard way.

Every session logs engine hours automatically. KartSync tracks your rebuild interval and flags it before you're caught out on a grid.

Engine hours, tracked per engine, rebuild flagged automatically
Advise

Jetting built on atmospherics — and on you.

KartSync reads today's temperature, pressure and altitude and recommends a carb setup for your engine class, refined against your own session history, not just a generic chart.

Live diagnosis — jetting, clip and needle, checked against your own history
Analyse

Full telemetry, mapped to the track.

Speed, RPM, EGT and GPS, plotted as full data traces you can zoom and overlay, then laid over a satellite view of the circuit coloured by whichever channel matters. Compare a reference lap against extra laps side by side, and define your own sectors rather than relying on the ones a logger's software assumes.

Satellite map, custom sectors
Speed trace & lap time delta vs fastest
Session consistency & corner minimum speed
Multi-Platform

Different Logger, Same Overlay.

Full analysis across multiple different data loggers, so you can share and compare data independent of the dash you run.

Live
Live
Coming Soon
Compare

Watch it back, side-by-side.

Sync onboard video with full telemetry, lap for lap — your own best against your worst, or your session against a teammate's.

Friends & Team

Overlay, Teach & Learn.

Connect with friends or teammates and compare setups and telemetry side by side, so you can see exactly where a faster lap was actually made.

Overlaying sessions — sector-by-sector, entry/exit speed, RPM and EGT compared
Remote Sharing

Your data, wherever your engineer is.

Everything lives in the cloud, so a coach or engineer who isn't at the track can open a session the moment it's saved.

Manager accounts — built for reviewing data away from the track
Ask AI

Ask it. It's read your data.

KartSync's AI agent knows your setup, your history and your session. Ask it why a lap was slow, what to try next, or what a temperature swing means for your jetting.

You Why is my EGT so high today?
KartSync AI It's cooler and higher pressure today than it was when you ran here last month, so you're running lean. Suggest +2 main jet.
Pricing

One platform. Choose your depth.

Every plan shares the same platform — the difference is how much of it you unlock.

Driver Free
Free

Log and store your setup data for easy review and recovery.

Driver Pro
TBC

Link telemetry to setup for full analysis, including satellite mapping and telemetry video review. Built for the privateer, solo review.

Driver Pro+
TBC

Everything in Pro, plus team and friend sharing for comprehensive side-by-side learning.

Manager
Always free

Bring every driver's setup and telemetry into one view — built for the team boss.

FeatureDriver FreeDriver ProDriver Pro+Manager

Privacy

You choose what leaves your garage.

Sharing on KartSync is always opt-in and per-session. Nothing is visible to a friend, teammate or manager until you choose to share it.

Nothing shared by default

A new session is private the moment it's saved. Setup and telemetry each have their own sharing switch, so you decide what's visible and to whom, session by session.

Built on real racing, not a spreadsheet

KartSync started as one engineer's telemetry analysis at the track, not a generic dashboard template — every feature exists because a real session needed it.

Stop guessing. Start syncing.

Setup, telemetry, video and your team — connected, from your first session.
